postmark.Subject: Refinance — Marcus Webb
postmark.TextBody:
Hi Franco,

Refi for Marcus Webb at 1142 Tory Road NW, Edmonton, AB T6R 2K8. Loan amount $280k.

Note: legal name on title is Marcus Anthony Webb but he goes by Marcus Webb for everything else.

Exit strategy: borrower intends to sell the property at end of term.

Jonathan Ferrara
Ferrara Financial
Lic. #M16002271

postmark.Subject: Re: Refinance — Marcus Webb
postmark.TextBody:
Use Marcus Webb (preferred) for the broker-facing prelim review and any borrower-facing comms. Keep Marcus Anthony Webb for the legal-doc package (commitment letter, title etc.). Borrower has explicit preference on which name appears where.

Jonathan Ferrara
Ferrara Financial
Lic. #M16002271
